input.cmd:
# Try a few more endpoints and see if there's a control plane
for p in / /check /health /healthz /ready /status /admin /waf /config /debug /metrics; do
  code=$(curl -s -o /tmp/out -w '%{http_code}' --max-time 2 "http://192.168.97.2:8080$p" 2>/dev/null || echo timeout)
  echo "$p -> $code $(head -c 80 /tmp/out 2>/dev/null)"
done
